summary.title: OWASP Juice Shop
summary.description: OWASP Juice Shop is probably the most modern and sophisticated insecure web application! It can be used in security trainings, awareness demos, CTFs and as a guinea pig for security tools! Juice Shop encompasses vulnerabilities from the entire OWASP Top Ten along with many other security flaws found in real-world applications!

diagrams.title: OWASP Cornucopia
diagrams.description: These are the OWASP Cornucopia threats connected with the OWASP Juice Shop challenges
